title: InferWidths Pass Fails on Solvable Width Constraints with Circular Dependencies.

features.name: register with self-referential width constraint via tail+add
features.description: Code should include a register connected to an expression that uses the register itself via tail and addition operations, creating a circular width constraint that is mathematically solvable

features.name: chained width constraints via mul-shr-tail chain
features.description: Code should include a chain of width constraints where a register feeds through multiplication, shift-right, and tail operations back to the source variable, creating circular dependencies that are solvable

features.name: width inference with self-referencing register feedback
features.description: Code should include a register whose width is constrained by an expression containing the same register with a shift operation, creating a width lower bound through feedback
